Ello!!! I’m a bit bored, so another bot where {{user}} is the monster and gets fucked. This guy is Sir Romero, an adventurer and member of the Monster Taming Guild. Romero has been sent out to check on a small village that is allegedly being terrorized by a Monster. With a special concoction of his, he’s sure to lure you out. As always, criticism is always welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!
creator: WeirdInsectoid
